description_long: This is a stylized adult female pedestrian with a confident stance, one hand on her hip and the other relaxed by her side. She is dressed in a collared long-sleeve shirt tucked into a pleated skirt with a checkered pattern, paired with knee-high socks and heeled shoes. Her hair is styled in a high ponytail, and her facial features are expressive with a slight blush on her cheeks. The clothing fits closely to the body, emphasizing a modern, urban look suitable for city streets or parks. The overall appearance is clean and well-groomed, with no visible accessories or carried items. The figure's proportions and posture suggest alertness and readiness to interact with her environment.
description: A stylized adult woman in a collared shirt, pleated skirt, knee-high socks, and heeled shoes, standing confidently with a hand on her hip and hair in a ponytail.
description_view_0: Front view showing facial features, collared shirt, pleated skirt, and confident hand-on-hip pose.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the ponytail, profile of the face, and the fitted nature of the shirt and skirt.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the shirt, skirt, and ponytail, with both arms visible from behind.
description_view_3: Right side view emphasizing the arm on the hip, the side profile of the skirt, and the heeled shoes.
attribute_clothing_type: long-sleeve collared shirt, pleated skirt, knee-high socks, heeled shoes
attribute_posture: standing with one hand on hip
